title: Dubai City Break
description: 3 nights in a 4-star hotel with breakfast. Ideal for a short getaway with optional desert safari.

title: Maldives Beach Escape
description: 5 nights in a beach resort with half board. Flights and transfers can be arranged.

title: Oman Adventure
description: 4 nights combining Muscat and desert. Discover heritage, wadis and warm hospitality.

title: Egypt Highlights
description: 5 nights Cairo & Nile. Pyramids, museums and optional cruise extension.
